steps.title: Find the probability of room C
steps.content:
Since each visitor is in exactly one room, the probabilities sum to 1:
$$P(A) + P(B) + P(C) = 1$$
$$0.48 + 0.24 + P(C) = 1$$
$$P(C) = 0.28$$

steps.title: Convert to visitor count
steps.content:
Multiply the probability by the total number of visitors:
$$\text{Visitors in room C} = 0.28 \times 375 = 105$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
